name: HangnDry
desc: HangnDry your laundry to save energy and get rewarded for skipping the dryer. It's a simple, satisfying way to live more sustainably cutting carbon emissions, lowering electricity use, and extending the life of your clothes. Whether you dry indoors on a rack or outdoors in the breeze, HangnDry turns everyday laundry into meaningful climate action.

name: BigBottle
desc:
A small choice, a big impact. 👍
Every time you choose a large bottle over a small one,
you're cutting plastic waste — right at the source.

name: ecobag
desc: EcoBag.vet is a community-powered DApp that rewards eco-conscious shoppers with B3TR tokens for making sustainable choices. Simply upload a picture of your reusable bag and receipt after shopping to earn rewards while reducing plastic waste. Built on VeChain and powered by VeBetterDAO, EcoBag.vet tracks your positive impact and offers real-world benefits, including redeemable NFTs for EcoBags. Join the movement toward a cleaner, greener future-one bag at a time.

name: Nubila
desc: Nubila is an innovative DePIN network that helps users earn rewards by collecting real-time hyperlocal weather data through decentralized weather devices and verifying the authenticity and validity of the data on the network.

name: Vyvo
desc: Experience the health revolution with Vyvo Smart Chain, where blockchain, IoT, and AI unite to transform how we manage well-being. We inspire individuals to actively monitor their health and, in return, reward them.

name: Bubbles
desc:
Refill. Scan. Earn.

BUBBLES tracks the use of refillable water bottles and rewards users for sustainable behavior. Each verified scan helps reduce CO₂ by replacing single-use plastic bottles.

name: EatGreen
desc:
EatGreen: The AWorld DApp That Rewards Sustainable Eating

EatGreen is a DApp developed by AWorld, the sustainability engagement platform used by the United Nations and the European Commission for their citizen awareness initiatives. Built within the VeBetterDAO ecosystem, EatGreen promotes eco-friendly eating habits by rewarding users with B3TR tokens for their contribution to sustainability.

How does it work?
1️⃣ Upload Your Dish – Snap a photo of your meal and upload it through the app.
2️⃣ CO₂eq Estimation – Using AI-powered image recognition, EatGreen analyzes the ingredients and estimates the dish’s carbon footprint.
3️⃣ Earn B3TR Tokens – The more sustainable your food choice, the more B3TR tokens you earn as a reward.

EatGreen combines AWorld’s expertise in sustainability engagement with blockchain transparency, fostering a conscious community committed to reducing the environmental impact of food. Users can track, improve, and get rewarded for their green choices—turning every meal into an opportunity to make a difference.

🌍 Powered by AWorld – Bringing sustainability to everyday actions.

Eat smart. EatGreen.

name: BlackVeMarket
desc: Discover Limitless NFT Experiences with BlackVeMarket: Where the VeFam Unites! Join our Vibrant Community and Explore the Boundless World of Digital Collectibles, Trading, and Creativity. Embrace the Future of NFTs and Unleash Your Imagination with BlackVeMarket!

name: WoV Marketplace
desc: The first gas-free, green NFT platform built on the VeChain blockchain

name: VeSea Marketplace
desc: A peer-to-peer marketplace for NFTs, rare digital items and crypto collectibles on the VeChain blockchain.
